rationale: Data-layer capacity verdict thresholds — the deterministic form of #587's Trigger B ("ledger outgrows local PG capacity"). The signal is the LEDGER's growth runway against the data volume's free space, NOT current total disk % (which is polluted by OS/docker images/ops logs). Verdict feeds ops-daily-diagnostics as a finding; 'trigger' means it is time to evaluate the RDS extraction in #587 (after the off-box dump + failover-rehearsal gates).

months_to_volume_full.note: df_avail / monthly_ledger_growth. <=trigger months of runway => evaluate RDS now.

usage_logs_pct_of_volume.note: Absolute guard: usage_logs alone occupying this share of the data volume.
